decisionRecords.rationaleSummary: Replace three serial transaction calculator workers with one atomic transaction-processing runtime while retaining separate cost, cashflow, and position application/domain modules.
inProcessBoundaryEvidence: ProcessTransactionUseCase coordinates typed cost, cashflow, and position ports through one financial unit of work.
Cost, cashflow, and position policies remain independently testable modules with explicit module observability.
The target removes duplicate runtime shells and partial normal-path completion states rather than merging unrelated domain logic.

decisionRecords.rationaleSummary: Current deployable listed in the Lotus Core microservice boundary matrix; retained as current-state while future runtime-boundary revalidation is performed.
inProcessBoundaryEvidence: Current-state service responsibility is documented in the microservice boundary matrix.
No new runtime split is approved by this catalog entry.
